intended_use: The CorInsights MRI Medical Image Processing Software is intended for automatic labeling, visualization and volumetric quantification of segmentable brain structures from MR images. Volumetric measure
intended_use_full: The CorInsights MRI Medical Image Processing Software is intended for automatic labeling, visualization and volumetric quantification of segmentable brain structures from MR images. Volumetric measurements are compared to reference percentile data. CorInsights MRI is intended for adults age 45 to 95.
target_condition: Assessment of brain structure volumes in various neurological conditions including cognitive decline, Mild Cognitive Impairment, Alzheimer's disease, and other dementias
ground_truth: Expert neuroanatomist manual segmentations from HaRP database and other databases; published literature values for clinically relevant cases
other_metrics: Hippocampal volume: IntraClass Correlation coefficient 0.95, DICE coefficient 83% left (SD 2.5%) and 83% right (SD 2.7%), mean absolute percentage difference 6.2% left (SD 4.4%) and 5.9% right (SD 5.1%). Cortical gray volume: IntraClass Correlation 0.99, DICE 95% (SD 1.6%), mean absolute percentage difference 4.5% (SD 1.8%). Cortical subregions: DICE 81-93%, mean absolute percentage difference 4.6%-13.8%. Intracranial Volume: IntraClass Correlation 0.89, DICE 95% (SD 1.1%), mean absolute percentage difference 5.2% (SD 4.4%). Ventricular: IntraClass Correlation 0.98, DICE 88% left (SD 5.2%) and 87% right (SD 5.6%), mean absolute percentage difference 13.9% left (SD 9.2%) and 15.2% right (SD 9.9%). Test-retest reproducibility: average IntraClass Correlation 0.97, DICE 89% (SD 4.0%), mean absolute percentage difference 0.7%-5.8% (average 2.3%, SD 2.7%).
